## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`bundle exec rspec`)
- [ ] RuboCop passes (`bundle exec rubocop`)
- [ ] RBS validates (`bundle exec rbs validate` — Ruby >= 3.2)
- [ ] Steep passes (`bundle exec steep check` — Ruby >= 3.2)
- [ ] New methods have YARD documentation
- [ ] New methods have RBS signatures (if applicable)
